nodes.name: Write Findings

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__findings || []).map((f) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, url: $json.__target, finding_id: f.finding_id, issue_class: f.issue_class, severity: f.severity, target_keyword: f.target_keyword, recommendation: f.recommendation, evidence: f.evidence, status: "open", run_date: $json.__run_date }))) }}
